titleStmt.title: SII 24.241: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 241. (A.R. No. 39 of 1936-37.) NORTH WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Records the assignment of the vṛittis to the temple, the Brāhmaṇas and services out of the lands referred to in the previous record. The village Ravivarma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam is stated to have been founded in the name of the king described as Tribhuvanachakravartin Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ by whom the record is issued. The date at the end of the record makes it assignable to the reign of Māṟavarmaṉ Kulaśēkkhara II (compare the numbers above). Nārāyaṇaṉ Aṉantaṉ, a signatory of this record figures also in No. 240 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī tirupuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉerimmai koṇṭāṉ tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil nam perāl vaitta Akaram Iravivaṉmaccaturvedimaṅkalattup paṭṭarkaḷukkut taṅkaḷukku bhāgam nūṟṟu Oṉpa
tum Ivvakarattu nām Eḻuntaruḷivitta nāyaṉār Iravinārāyaṇap perumāḷukku bhāgam pattum vedavṛtti muṉṟukku bhāgam Oṉṟaraiyum purāṇavṛttikku bhāgam Araiyum vaittiya vṛttik
ku bhāgam Oṉṟum palapaṇica vṛttikaḷukku bhāgam Iraṇṭum Āka bhāgam nūṟṟu Irupattu nālukkum taṅkaḷ perāl palar pakkalum Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal vilai koṇṭa vaṭa
karai Irā[ja*]rā[ja*] vaḷanāṭṭu melaimuṟi pāccilk kūṟṟattu mel palāṟṟu toṭai yūrum Innāṭṭu kiḻaimuṟiyil naṭṭaṇaṅkuṭiyum maḻavaṉūrum Ivvūrkaḷ nāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa paḻantevata
(vat)āṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam paḷḷiccantamum neṭṭaṇaṅkuṭiyil Iṟaiyaṇṇaṉ Akarattār nilam muṉṟemukkāṇiyum Uḷḷa naṉcey puṉcey nattam paṭukai maranilai nirnilai Uḷ
ppaṭṭa Ivaiyum Ikkiḻaimuṟiyil Iṭaiyāṟṟumaṅkalattu sapaiyār pakkal Ivvūr vaṭa piṭākaiyil vilaikoṇṭa pramāṇappaṭi nilam Irupattai veliyum nattam puṉcey nilam mukkā
le Irumāvaraiyum maranilaiyum Innilattil varum prāptikaḷum Ivvūrkaḷukkum Innilattukkum vāttalainir vaḻaṅkuṅ kālkaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭa samatta prāptikaḷum bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum Uṭ
paṭa Aṉupokamākavum . Ivaiyiṟṟil kārmaṟu Oru pūk kaṭaippū vampum kamukum koṭiyum karumpum ceṉṉel ceṅkaḻunir vāḻai Iñci mañcaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivai tāṅkaḷ veṇṭiṉa payir ceytu
koḷḷavum Iṉavayiṟṟāl Uḷḷa nel(k)kaṭaimai kācukaṭamai kamukukaṭamai māvaṭai puṉpayirkkaṭamai nirāṇi veṭṭi kāverikkulai kāttikaip paccai nattap paccai Eṭuttuk kāṭṭum paccai piḷḷaiyār noṉpu Ā
ṇṭeḻuttut tevai Eṇṇaippantam ciṟṟāyam perāyam kaṭaiyāyam taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārppāṭṭam mavunam pāṭṭam pācippāṭṭam Oḻukku nirp pāṭṭam viṭṭuttevai Āṉaiccālai kutiraippanti kuḷatte
vai varittevai vācal viṉiyokam Olai Eḻuttu viṉiyokam Ilaicciṉai viṉi yokam na viṉiyokam nāṭṭu viṉiyokam ciṟai Accu Āḷuntaccum koṟṟilak kai kaṭaikkūṭṭu Ilakkai vi
ṭaipperppeṟu pañcupili Āḷvari Ērvari Iṉavari vācalvari vācalppaṇam vālppaṇam Ūcivāci mukampārvai Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittu Upātikaḷum tevaikaḷum Uḷpaṭat taṅkaḷukku bhūdāna Iṟaiyi
liyākavum Ivvūrkaḷil tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam paḷḷiccantam Uḷḷiṭṭa ttu potum mutal taṅkaḷukkut tāṉamākavum kkum kovilukkum paṇṭuṭaiyār paḻaṅkāṇiyāḷar kai
yyāl pramāṇappaṭiyum tāṉattār mahāniyokamum śrī ceṉāpatip peruvilaikku perumāḷ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ tirumukappaṭiyum koṇṭa vitamum vāstuśeṣamum paṭukaiyum Ivaiyiṟṟil Uḷḷa maraṅka
ḷum Āka Ivai Ittaṉaiyum taṅkaḷukku Aṉupokamākavum Ippaṭiyāl varum mutalkaḷ taṅkaḷukku jivaṉattukkum tiruvārātaṉattukkum Uṭalākap paṇṭuṭaiyār paḻaṅkāṇiyāḷaraiyum tavirt
tu Utaka pūrvamāka bhudāna Iṟaiyiliyāka tantu variyilum niṟuttac coṉṉom . Ippaṭikku Ivvolaiye piṭipāṭākakkoṇṭu cantrātitta varai cellumpaṭi kallilum cempilum ve
ṭṭuvittuk koṇṭu Aṉupavittup potuka . Ivai veṭciyūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu— yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu nāḷ 2 100 10 9 . Ivai nārāyaṇaṉ Aṉantaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
